9:35AM CT. IN SESSION. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PL. CLOSING ARGUMENT- DEF. CLOSING ARGUMENT - PL'S REBUTTAL - JURY ADMONISHED - RECESS 10:48AM CT. IN SESSION - ALL PARTIES PRESENT - JUDGE INSTRUCTS THE JURY - BAILIFF SWORN - JURY RETIRES TO DELIBERATE - ALT. JUROR PLACED ON TELEPHONE STANDBY - PL. EXH#5 WITHDRAWN BY STIP. OF BOTH COUNSEL. 12:00 NOON JURY RETURNS TO OPEN COURT - AGAIN, JURY ADMONISHED - LUCH RECESS. 1:35PM COURT IN SESSION - ALL PARTIES PRESENT (DAVID DEL SIMONE APPEARS FOR THE PL) - JUDGE MAKES REMARKS TO JURY IN REGARDS TO THEIR DELIBERATION - JURY RETIRES TO DELIBERATE. 1:52PM JURY RETURNS TO OPEN COURT W/VERDICT - CLERK READS VERDICT - JURY FINDS FOR THE PL. & AGAINST DEF. FOR REST OF PREMISES AT 870-J MCALLISTER ST, S.F, CA. 94102 & ASSESSES DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $1,294.80 - JURORS THANKED & EXCUSED - PL. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
